description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a prominent orange gable roof and a rectangular footprint, situated on a corner lot with a paved driveway and surrounding sidewalk. The front features a covered porch supported by columns, with a small set of steps leading up to the entrance. Large windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light, while the sides and rear show additional windows and a secondary entrance. The property is landscaped with several trees, shrubs, and decorative plants, and includes a driveway with a parked car and a streetlamp at the corner. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the vivid roof and greenery. The overall setting suggests a suburban or residential neighborhood context, with clear boundaries between the lot and the adjacent street.
description: A single-story bungalow with an orange gable roof, covered porch, large windows, and landscaped yard on a corner lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and two large trees flanking the bungalow.
description_view_1: View highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the main entrance with visible porch details.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the bungalow, additional windows, and landscaping along the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back entrance, more landscaping, and the boundary of the lot with a streetlamp.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
